description_long: This is a large, modern ranch-style house with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in dark gray tiles. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored siding, complemented by large windows, including a prominent set of picture windows at the front. The house is built on a sloped lot, with a raised deck and stairs at the rear, and a spacious driveway and carport at the front. There are multiple entry points, including a main entry with a covered porch and steps, and a secondary entrance accessible from the deck. The property features a mix of open and covered outdoor spaces, with railings and support columns visible on the deck. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines, open views, and integration with the surrounding terrain.
description: A large, modern ranch-style house with a multi-gabled dark roof, light siding, large windows, and a raised rear deck. The design features open outdoor spaces, a carport, and prominent picture windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, carport, large picture windows, and driveway.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the raised deck, stairs, and multiple windows along the back facade.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the sloped lot, deck extension, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the roof complexity, deck, and integration with the terrain.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and mixed window sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with steps, simple door, and minimal decorative elements
